2388610.name: Champions of Quortz
2388610.description:
Repeatable Boss Fights

Fight your favorite bosses again and again without having to load a previous save. With each victory, the boss will become stronger, as well as drop more impressive loot.


Gain Loot & Other Rewards

After defeating a boss, you will receive gold, crystals and materials to equip and upgrade your Champions. Defeating stronger bosses of course means better loot drops. You might even find a few secrets if certain bosses are defeated at high enough levels...


Upgrade your Champions

If your enemies become stronger with each victory you earn, so should you! Boost your stats by leveling up, equipping unique and powerful crystals and upgrading your stats permanently with materials you collect. Is there a limit to how strong your Champions can become?
